Essential Rules for Wearing and Maintaining Your Rudraksha

June 15, 2026•By Rudraksha Lanka Team

A Rudraksha is not just a piece of jewelry; it is a living entity vibrating with cosmic energy. To honor this sacred bead and receive its full blessings, it requires respect and proper maintenance.

Firstly, conditioning your bead before wearing it for the first time is highly recommended. Soak the bead in pure ghee for 24 hours, followed by soaking it in full-fat milk for another 24 hours. This natural conditioning prevents the bead from cracking and extends its life for generations.

When it comes to daily rules, it is widely advised to remove your Rudraksha before taking a bath using chemical soaps, as chemicals can dry out and damage the natural structure of the bead. You should also remove it before sleeping to prevent it from accidentally breaking.

Finally, maintain a pure intention. The Rudraksha responds to your aura. Clean it occasionally with a soft brush and oil it with mustard or sandalwood oil once a month. Treat it with devotion, and it will serve as an unshakeable shield of protection and prosperity in your life.
